name: Classic Green Chile Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 cups green New Mexican chiles, roasted, peeled, stems and seeds removed, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and garlic to the skillet. Sauté until the onions are softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the roasted and chopped green chiles to the skillet. Stir to combine.
4. Pour in the chopped tomato (and cumin, if using) and water. Stir to mix all ingredients together.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
6. Remove from heat and let cool slightly before blending or mashing to achieve desired consistency.
